title: what is iron maiden about
wikitext:
[]: what is iron maiden about?             Quote Post by Magnus » Sat Jul 31, 2004 4:09 am Right, I've got lots of pics and heard about this eva game called iron maiden. I don't care about spoilers (I'm probably not going to get my hands on te game) i just want to know what happens in it, or a website with said info on it.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jul 31, 2004 4:16 am you can try www.evangelion.ca. It has some informations.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sat Jul 31, 2004 5:06 am It's called girlfriend of steel I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:12 pm Try this site: http://www.geocities.com/tdd_evangelion/girlfriend.html and also this site: http://mywebpages.comcast.net/juzzam1/NGEManapix.htm

[]:             Quote Post by Magnus » Sun Aug 01, 2004 2:02 am cheers.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 01, 2004 4:51 pm the game is a dating sim that lets you pick who Shinji ends up with. Or as i like to put it another mony making effort by the makers of eva.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sun Aug 01, 2004 8:43 pm And if they released it in America we would buy it dammit!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Aug 03, 2004 10:37 pm cain luppus wrote: And if they released it in America we would buy it dammit!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:43 am i'm assuming youre talking about the second one...

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:58 am Iron Maiden 1: takes place in the normal Eva world. You interact with a new exchange student named Mana. Kawaii!!! # #! Iron Maiden 2: takes place in the alternate world that Shinji sees in Ep. 26. The game starts at the point where Rei is introduced to Shinji's class. It's a dating sim game. And yes, if they brought them over... we would buy them!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Aug 08, 2004 12:30 pm is it for computers?

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 12:41 pm I have Iron Maiden (english translated) and Girlfriend Of Steel 2 (Japanese) in full ISOs I've finished both of them and i must say, Iron Maiden was amazing! It's like another Eva episode! GoS2 was kinda boring..

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Aug 08, 2004 12:52 pm really? it sounded quite fun...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Aug 08, 2004 2:16 pm What are you supposed to do in GoS2?I have seen some images with Rei and Asuka with Shinji.It's only dates and these kind of stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Aug 08, 2004 2:54 pm GoS2 is set in the altenate universe. It's pretty much about interacting with Rei and Asuka, giving you the desicion of who Shinji gets to be with. The story is kinda cool. For an example, here's the doujinshi manga created for the second game. http://g221.by.ru/anime/manga/girlfriend%20of%20steel%202/ I have Iron Maiden (english translated) and Girlfriend Of Steel 2 (Japanese) in full ISOs

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:28 pm Kiel wrote: GoS2 is set in the altenate universe. It's pretty much about interacting with Rei and Asuka, giving you the desicion of who Shinji gets to be with. The story is kinda cool. For an example, here's the doujinshi manga created for the second game. http://g221.by.ru/anime/manga/girlfriend%20of%20steel%202/ I have Iron Maiden (english translated) and Girlfriend Of Steel 2 (Japanese) in full ISOs

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Aug 09, 2004 7:34 pm Kiel wrote: The story is kinda cool. For an example, here's the doujinshi manga created for the second game. http://g221.by.ru/anime/manga/girlfriend%20of%20steel%202/

[]:             Quote Post by Asterix » Fri Aug 20, 2004 3:15 am max3000 wrote: I can make another ISO image. But i don't have a site to upload the game. So what i suggest you to do is do it the hard way: Download an eMule client and download it from there.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Aug 19, 2009 7:17 pm Anybody know where and if I can find some quotes or possibly a transcript from the game for Mana? Im looking for quotes for all of Shinji's gals to use for my Sig. I need Asuka, Mana, Mari, Mayumi and Rei. If anyone can help me find some of their lines I would appreciate it. to be honest, I could probably do Mari, Asuka and Rei myself, its the more obscure I need help with.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Wed Aug 19, 2009 8:46 pm Well I'm sure you guys would buy them, but Evangelion isn't as popular in the U. S. let alone dating sims. The market isn't good here for eva games, and sadly that's why so many of them have escaped our grasp. I liked the title iron maiden better, mostly for the literal meaning behind it. Edit:There's no translation for GoS 2? I really wanted to check that one out. ALSO, Girlfriend of steel has a manga line based on the second game. It's called Angelic Days in the U.S. not sure if the Japanese go by the same title though.

I don't care about spoilers (I'm probably not going to get my hands on te game) i just want to know what happens in it, or a website with said info on it.
